enabled.description: Whether the provider is enabled for the organization.

scopes.description: The OAuth scopes to request for the organization. Pass `null` to inherit the provider scopes.

client_id.description: The OAuth client ID of the organization's own application. Must be provided together with `client_secret`, and only for providers whose credentials are supplied by the organization.

client_secret.description: The OAuth client secret of the organization's own application. Must be provided together with `client_id`.
